fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unique code of the issue reminder setup.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the issue reminder setup.

fields.name: Replace Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to replace the posting date of the reminder with the posting date of the original document.

fields.name: Replace Posting Date formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies the formula that is used to calculate the posting date of the reminder. Base date is the date when the job is started.

fields.name: Replace VAT Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to replace the VAT date of the reminder with the VAT date of the original document.

fields.name: Replace VAT Date formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies the formula that is used to calculate the VAT date of the reminder. Base date is the date when the job is started.

fields.name: Journal Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal template that is used for the posting.

fields.name: Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal batch that is used for the posting.
